{"id":"project-LICHEN-da2q.2","title":"All impls: Multi-channel TX/RX","description":"Implement multi-channel coordination in all codebases.

## Shared logic
1. Channel selection for TX (hash or rendezvous)
2. Idle listen on control channel
3. Hop to data channel for RX when expecting packet
4. Parse RX_CHANNEL from announces

## Python
- Add channel param to radio TX/RX
- Channel selector in link layer

## Rust
- Add channel to radio trait
- Channel coordination module

## Zephyr
- Extend LoRa driver API with channel param
- Add channel coordination to link layer
- Kconfig: CONFIG_LICHEN_MULTI_CHANNEL_ENABLED, CONFIG_LICHEN_N_CHANNELS

## Gateway
- Multi-channel RX (listen on all, or fast round-robin)
- May need multiple radios for true parallel RX","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T18:21:30.692118Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T18:21:30.692118Z","labels":["python","rust","zephyr","implementation","phy","scalability"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-da2q.2","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-da2q","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-16T18:21:30.850032Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-da2q.2","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-da2q.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-07-16T18:21:30.979496Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
new_value: {"notes":"Production implementation is blocked until both project-LICHEN-i9r0.2 and project-LICHEN-da2q.3 pass the canonical CCP-16 simulator gates."}

new_value: {"acceptance_criteria":"Cross-implementation vectors match; all CCP-16 gates remain green; Linux Zephyr and host tests pass; prohibited channels never transmit; rendezvous loss recovers to CH0 within five seconds; receiver concurrency never exceeds hardware capability.","description":"After i9r0.2 and da2q.3 pass, implement CCP v1 multi-channel support in Python, Rust, and Zephyr: versioned local regional plans, channel-aware radio APIs, signed per-hop CHANNEL_REQUEST/GRANT/REJECT, bounded retune/expiry behavior, CH0 priority/fallback, scheduled channel cells, explicit single/parallel receiver limits, and per-regulatory-group airtime accounting. Do not implement persistent RX_CHANNEL announcements, blind gateway scanning, LoRaWAN uplink/downlink assumptions, or a fixed capacity multiplier.","design":"Implement spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md exactly from canonical vectors and simulator evidence. A radio occupies one channel unless explicit deployed hardware advertises parallel chains.","title":"All impls: CCP multi-channel rendezvous"}
